final:
module johnson_counter (
  input clk,
  input reset,
  output reg [2:0] q
);

  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
      q <= 3'b000;
    end else begin
      q <= {~q[0], q[2:1]};
    end
  end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= 3'b111;
    end
  end

endmodule
